items.headline: No sleep, no problem as Gordon shines in Rox return

news_items.headline: A’s Suffer Heartbreaker to Open Road Trip
Arizona Diamondbacks 12, San Francisco Giants 2: Ray-pocalypse Now
news_items.summary: Record: 23-23. Pace: 81-81. Change on 2025: -1. I’ve learned not to tempt the baseball gods by starting on the recap too early. The only time I did so far this season, was the game against the Orioles, where the D-backs led 7-2 in the middle of the sixth inning. It… did not end well. […]

news_items.headline: Emerson's family missed his MLB debut. They didn't miss his 1st MLB HR
Athletics' T.J. Ginn loses no-hitter as Angels hit walkoff homer in 9th
news_items.summary: J.T. Ginn lost a no-hit bid and then the game as the Los Angeles Angels defeated the Athletics with a wakoff homer in the bottom of the ninth.

news_items.headline: Holy Sheets!, Padres sweep the Mariners
Twins 6, Astros 3: Two hours later…
news_items.summary: Josh Bell made some runs and Ryan Jeffers got hurt. Sometimes that’s just how the season goes for the Twins.

Mets follow Subway Series with 'resilience' and 'grit' in series-opening win at Nationals
news_items.summary: The New York Mets' grit and resilience shine in a 16-7 extra-inning win over the Washington Nationals.

news_items.headline: Angels beat Athletics on walk-off homer despite A's starter J.T. Ginn throwing 8 no-hit innings
news_items.summary: Ginn nearly threw a no-hitter on Monday, but the Angels had the last laugh in a disastrous outing for the A's.
